description: Index Reconstitution / Forced-Flow Desk - projects Russell 2000 additions/deletions and 1000<->2000 migrations from live market caps, scores forced passive flow vs daily volume, plus S&P 500 inclusion candidates. Output data/index-recon.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Daily 14:10 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler. Refreshes the Russell reconstitution projection and the S&P 500 inclusion-candidate watch list. Provisioned by ops 839.
